title: useReducer Syntax and Basics
description: Write your first reducer and dispatch actions.

slides.title: useReducer Hook 🎣
Using Payload
slides.content: You can also pass additional data in the action:

quizData.question: What does the `dispatch` function do?

options.text: It sends an action to the reducer

quizData.explanation: `dispatch` sends an action object to the reducer, which then computes the new state.
